visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a static close-up shot of a white indoor wall. A significant, jagged vertical crack is visible, running down from a beige padded object, possibly a headboard. The lighting is bright and uniform, suggesting typical indoor residential lighting. (2) A hand with light skin and well-manicured nails enters the frame from the bottom right, clutching a piece of crumpled white tissue. The hand carefully wipes the floor area where the wall meets the dark brown baseboard, cleaning up small pieces of fallen plaster. (3) The hand then shifts position, forming a fist to knock on the wall surface next to the crack, presumably testing its structural integrity or sound. After knocking, the fingers are spread out to gently touch the edge of the fracture before the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 剛剛地震做的😱. [Slogan]: (已經有跟房東聯絡). (2) [Subtitle]: 感覺我今天會睡不著🥲.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female hand is the only part of a human visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only the hand of the main character is visible; she has light skin and natural nails.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A white interior wall with a prominent vertical crack. A beige padded surface is at the top, and a dark floor molding is at the bottom, resting on light-colored mats.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music begins instantly, featuring a prominent electronic beat and synth pad. A female voice speaks with clear articulation but detectable tension, narrating her experience. (2) A soft, low-frequency rustling sound is audible, coinciding with the hand moving across the floor. The BGM remains steady in the background. (3) Two sharp, percussive thuds resonate as the wall is struck. The female speaker's tone drops slightly at the end, conveying a sense of helplessness or worry. (4) The track continues with the vocal and music layers overlapping until the audio cut at the video's end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a social media update or status report, where the creator shows property damage (a cracked wall) resulting from a recent earthquake. By showing the physical evidence and checking the state of the wall, the creator shares her anxiety and informs her audience that she has already taken the responsible step of contacting the landlord.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video focuses on a single incident of structural damage, using text overlays to provide context that isn't fully apparent from visual cues alone.
